Third-party attackers or faulty functionality may block the system or cause the system or users to lose funds. Important system invariants can be violated. ... Issue resolution includes “dismissed” or “acknowledged” but no action taken, by the client, or “resolved”, per the auditors. ... The function GmxHedgingReactor::gmxPositionCallback, which updates the internalDelta storage variable of the reactor as part of the two step process used by GMX to execute positions, does not impose a limit on the msg.sender or the amount of times that it may be called.

followup_results.title: Sherlock — GMX Exchange Hack Explained
followup_results.content: Panprog was also asked how the exploitable code remained despite numerous auditors looking into the code back in 2022. “I've seen many reentrancy possibilities in live contracts or in contests, where you can reenter, but can't do much damage. Like you can change the order of event emissions, or do something unintended, but harmless, like letting zero size order pass, which isn't allowed but doesn't cause any issues.. These are often at most low severity and so might not be reported.”
